# Voyager

> The missing OS for Gemini -- an open-source browser extension that adds timeline navigation, folder organization, prompt vault, chat export, and 20+ productivity features to Google Gemini and Google AI Studio.

## Links

- [Documentation](https://voyager.nagi.fun/en/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager)
- [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/voyager/iifacdnjakkhjjiengaffnegbndgingi)
- [Edge Add-ons](https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/voyager/gibmkggjijalcjinbdhcpklodjkhhlne)
- [Firefox Add-ons](https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/gemini-voyager/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://voyager.nagi.fun/en/privacy)
- [Installation Guide](https://voyager.nagi.fun/en/guide/installation)

## About

Voyager is an open-source (GPLv3) browser extension that transforms the Google Gemini and AI Studio experience. It works on Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari, Opera, and Brave. All data is stored locally in the browser with optional Google Drive cloud sync. No tracking, no data collection.

### Core Features

- **Timeline Navigation**: Visual conversation navigator with clickable nodes, Vim-style keyboard shortcuts (j/k/gg/GG), starred bookmarks, and collapsible message levels
- **Folder Organization**: Drag-and-drop folder system for organizing Gemini conversations with nested folders, search, and bulk operations
- **Prompt Vault**: Save, organize, and reuse prompts with folder management and one-click insertion into any conversation
- **Chat Export**: Export conversations to Markdown, PDF, or JSON -- full data ownership with no lock-in
- **Cloud Sync**: Back up folders, prompts, and starred messages to Google Drive across devices
- **Formula Copy**: One-click copy for LaTeX and MathML (Word-compatible) source codes
- **Deep Research Export**: Extract research processes, thinking steps, and source links from Gemini Deep Research sessions
- **Mermaid Diagrams**: Render flowcharts, sequence diagrams, Gantt charts, and more inline in conversations
- **NanoBanana**: Lossless watermark removal from Gemini-generated images
- **Quote Reply**: Select any text in a conversation to quote and reply with context
- **Batch Delete**: Select multiple conversations and delete them all at once
- **Default Model**: Auto-switch to your preferred Gemini model on every new chat
- **Message Timestamps**: Auto-record when each message was sent
- **Sidebar Auto-hide**: Sidebar collapses when your mouse leaves for distraction-free conversations
- **Conversation Fork**: Branch any conversation at any message node to explore different directions
- **Tab Title Sync**: Browser tab title automatically reflects the current conversation
- **Send Behavior**: Choose between Enter-to-send or Ctrl+Enter-to-send
- **Font Size Control**: Adjust chat font size for comfortable reading

### What Makes Voyager Different

Voyager is designed as a comprehensive operating system layer for Gemini, not just a single-feature extension. It combines navigation, organization, export, and customization into one cohesive tool. Unlike alternatives that focus on one aspect, Voyager provides a unified experience across both Gemini and AI Studio, with full privacy (local-only storage), cross-browser support, and 10-language localization.

### Supported Platforms

- Google Gemini (gemini.google.com)
- Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com)
- Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari, Opera, Brave
